game_name: The Magical Quest Starring Mickey Mouse

design_philosophy.core_loop: Platforming progression through themed levels, switching between outfit-based ability sets to overcome environmental and enemy obstacles
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Managing outfit-specific resource meters (magic/water) while navigating hazards and defeating enemies with context-appropriate tools
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Mickey Mouse as adaptable hero, gaining magical powers and specialized gear to rescue Pluto from Emperor Pete's realm
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Heavy emphasis on outfit-gating progression—specific tools unlock specific paths. Nonlinear problem-solving within levels through outfit swapping and environmental interaction (pushing blocks, creating icicles, controlling objects). Approachable platforming design with enemy variety rather than extreme precision requirements

difficulty.lives_system: Health meter expansion available via collectible hearts throughout levels
difficulty.checkpointing: Level-based progression structure with six distinct levels
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player can expand health capacity by collecting special hearts scattered in levels, providing resource-based difficulty mitigation

progression.upgrade_system: Outfit system with four distinct character costumes (default, magician, firefighter, mountain-climbing gear). Outfits can be upgraded in shops using coins collected throughout levels. Health meter expansion via heart collection.
progression.unlock_mechanism: Outfits awarded progressively through level advancement (magician at level 2, firefighter at level 3, climbing gear at level 4 via Goofy). Outfit abilities unlock stage-specific paths and solutions.
replayability_hooks: Multiple outfit solutions per environmental puzzle
Coin collection for shop upgrades encourages thoroughness
GBA remake added minigames and competitive multiplayer modes

world_building_techniques: Dream narrative framing (game events revealed as Mickey's dream upon waking)
Character-driven plot (rescue Pluto from Emperor Pete)
Themed level design reflecting magical land geography
NPC interactions (old wizard exposition, Goofy equipment gifting)

faction_indicators: Mickey vs. Emperor Pete's magical kingdom
Allied NPCs: Donald Duck, Goofy, old wizard
danger_signals: Magical realm hazards (fires, underwater sections, climbing dangers)
Environmental traps tied to outfit-based puzzle solving
environmental_storytelling: Themed level progression (magical forest, industrial/water zones, mountain terrain)
Outfit-specific environmental interactions (water puts out fires, magic opens paths)
Coin and heart placement guiding player exploration
